privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic task in a test Magento environment where an agent will create a configurable product. All metadata claims have been verified against the task description and implementation scripts. The task requires creating: (1) a dropdown product attribute with code 'shirt_color' and label 'Shirt Color' with three options (White, Blue, Black); (2) a configurable product with SKU 'SHIRT-OXFORD-001', name 'Oxford Dress Shirt', price $59.99, assigned to the 'Clothing' category; (3) three associated simple product variants (one for each color option). All metadata values are consistent across the task description, shell scripts, and Python verifier.
